results.name: book-cover
results.description: Card art that has been used as the cover of various Magic novels.

results.name: booster tutor
results.description: Cards, usually acorn cards, that have you open booster packs to add into the game.

results.name: borrow ability
results.description: Cards that give themselves or other creatures keyword abilities if something else has it. See also [keyword soup](keyword-soup).

results.name: bosco
results.description: The Earth King's pet bear. Not a platypus-bear, not a skunk-bear, not an armadillo-bear. Just a bear.

results.name: bottomless mana sink
results.description: Repeatable effects that, if an arbitrary amount of mana is dumped into them, will probably win you the game—for example, by drawing your whole deck, creating an arbitrarily large attacker, making an endless army of tokens, gaining infinite life, etc.

results.name: bounce
results.description: Returning a permanent from the battlefield to its owner's hand

results.name: bounceable aura
results.description: Auras you can bounce back to your hand.

results.name: bounceland
results.description: Non-basic lands which tap for two mana, but require you to return a land to your hand when you play them.

results.name: brahmin
results.description: A two-headed cow from the Fallout franchise

results.name: braids (character) (human)
results.description: Braids, when she was a human.

results.name: brainstorm
results.description: Draw a number of cards, then put cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
